case_title: RICHARD RUNOEL RESPONDENT VS. ROBERT ROY APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT ROY, ROBERT AS TO RESPONDENT RUNOEL, RICHARD HEARING SET FOR OCT-23-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2003 - JUDGMENT RENDERED BY JUDGE WALLACE DOUGLASS AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT IS ORDERED FOR DEFENDANT, ROBERT ROY AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF, RICHARD RUNDEL. COST OF $86.00 ARE GRANTED TO THE DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2003 - OFF CALENDAR IN DEPT. 525 TRANSFERED TO DEPT. 001 WALLACE P. DOUGLASS FOR HEARING BY A JUDGE. PARTIES FAILED TO STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN C. GASKILL. D. CARTER, CLERK;
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
MINUTES FOR OCT-23-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
